emails.subject: Re: inquiry
emails.body: Re: inquiry Yes I finally reached someone at Avista who had been working on the problem as well. She filled me in on a few things, and I straightened out the story with our broker. It turned out to be Avista's fault they failed to report to their broker that we paid them for a futures contract, and that triggered a domino effect of payment inquiries. We did pay, and the record shows that. Thanks for following up! Kate From: Sharen Cason 04/26/2001 08:18 AM

emails.subject: inquiry
emails.body: inquiry I did call you back yesterday on the Avista thing, but you were in a meeting. Did you ever find the deal or get an answer?
